bird.name: 黄腹啸鹟
bird.summary: 黄腹啸鹟（学名：Pachycephala philippinensis），是啸鹟科啸鹟属的一种，为菲律宾的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。 黄腹啸鹟的平均体重约为22.3克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。

locations.name: Bicol Natural Park
locations.summary: The Bicol Natural Park is a protected area of the Philippines located in the Bicol Region of southern Luzon.

locations.name: Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape
locations.summary: The Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape is a protected landscape area of forested limestone hills, grasslands and natura…

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: 黄腹啸鹟
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Bicol Natural Park, Pasonanca Natural Park, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape, Samar Island Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

relations.subject: 黄腹啸鹟
relations.evidence: IUCN has assessed this bird as least-concern species despite deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
